faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Cais Investimentos

items.question: What is the minimum amount to start investing with Cais?
items.answer: There is no fixed minimum. We adapt our solutions to each client's profile and available capital. Contact us for a personalized assessment.

items.question: How does the partnership with BTG Pactual work?
items.answer: We are an office accredited by BTG Pactual, Latin America's largest investment bank. This allows us to offer access to all BTG platform and exclusive products to our clients.

items.question: What certifications does the Cais team have?
items.answer: Our team holds CEA (Investment Specialist Certification), CFP® (Certified Financial Planner) and FGV MBA certifications, plus over 30 years of financial market experience.

items.question: Does Cais serve clients throughout Brazil?
items.answer: Yes! Although we have physical offices in Santa Maria de Jetibá/ES and Recife/PE, we serve clients throughout Brazil with digital and in-person meetings.

items.question: How is my portfolio managed?
items.answer: We conduct a complete analysis of your investor profile, objectives and time horizon. We then build a diversified portfolio and make periodic adjustments as the market and your needs evolve.

items.question: How often do I receive reports about my investments?
items.answer: We provide detailed monthly reports and are available for periodic follow-up meetings. You also have real-time access to the BTG Pactual platform.

footer.description: Personalized investment advisory for individuals and companies.
footer.disclaimer: Cais Investimentos Assessor De Investimento Ltda, registered under CNPJ No. 49.404.040/0001-98, is an investment advisory company duly registered with the Comissão de Valores Mobiliários (CVM) pursuant to CVM Resolution 178. Operating in the financial market as an agent of Banco BTG Pactual S/A, which can be verified through the ANCORD website (<ancordLink>https://www.ancord.org.br/certificacao-e-credenciamento/</ancordLink>) or through the Necton Investimentos website (<nectonLink>https://www.necton.com.br/seja-parceiro/</nectonLink>). Banco BTG Pactual S/A is a financial institution that is part of the securities distribution system, acting as an intermediary for its clients' transactions. Under CVM regulations, the investment advisor cannot manage or administer investors' assets, as it is an agent of the intermediary and depends on prior client authorization to carry out transactions in the financial market. In derivatives transactions, there is a possibility of significant financial losses, even exceeding the amounts invested. The advisory may carry out other activities related to the financial, capital markets, insurance, pension and capitalization sectors, which may or may not be in partnership with BTG Pactual or other institutions, and which may or may not be carried out by the same legal entity as the advisory. Specifically regarding asset management, consulting and securities analysis activities, these may be performed by group companies and never by the investment advisory itself, as they are conflicting activities that require segregation. Investing in stocks is a risk investment and past performance does not guarantee future returns. For complaints, please contact the Ombudsman of Banco BTG Pactual S/A at 0800-722-0048.
